final_prompt.prompt:

Style/medium: promotional poster with artistic typography, layered/stacked fonts
Composition: 16:9 aspect ratio, complex but not cluttered layout, product or subject overlapping/obscuring parts of text
Subject: product or main subject blocking some text
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: complex composition, artistic typography, font stacking, product/subject overlapping text, 16:9 ratio
Avoid: cluttered appearance
